programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate when the appearance of a headless horseman foreshadows a number of deaths.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Convicted murderer Grady Felton's return to the village is met with anger from the locals; when a barrister is killed, he becomes a suspect; he is targeted in an arson attack.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones are called in to investigate the death of amateur astronomer Jeremy Harper, who was killed by a blow to the head with a meteorite.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Life and death imitates art as a murder matches that of a 1960s horror film.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: When Rick is asked to assist with a federal investigation of his childhood friend Robbie, Magnum launches his own investigation to see what the federal agents really have on him; Kumu goes undercover in a retirement community.

programme.title: The Marsh King's Daughter
programme.desc: A woman returns to the wilds of her youth to face her father, who kept her and her mother captive for years.

programme.title: The Shadow of Violence
programme.desc: An ex-boxer turned enforcer has his loyalties tested when his employers order him to kill for the first time.

programme.title: Sicario
programme.desc: An idealistic FBI agent is enlisted by an elite task force official to aid in the escalating war against drugs

programme.title: Mud
programme.desc: Two boys discover a desperado on the run. After hearing his incredible tale, they decide to help him.

programme.title: Secret in Their Eyes
programme.desc: A team of investigators is torn apart when one of their teenage daughters is brutally murdered.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Kill Switch
programme.desc: A psychopathic killer is ravaging Memphis, Tennesse by murdering young women and Detective Jacob Stillwell is on the case. Known as the resident tough cop due to his aggressive tactics, he gets knocked sideways when his girlfriend becomes one of the murder victims. With his partner, Storm Anderson, in tow, Jacob casts the rules aside and infiltrates the seedy criminal underworld of the city looking to avenge his lover's death and put an end to the killings.

programme.title: Hit & Run [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Charlie Bronson (Dax Shepard), a nice guy with a shady past as a getaway driver, breaks out of the witness protection program in a backwater California town to drive his girlfriend, Annie (Kristen Bell), to Los Angeles for an important job interview. The pair's road trip takes an awkward and dangerous turn when they find that an inept federal agent (Tom Arnold) and the mobster (Bradley Cooper) he testified against are both trying to hunt them down.

programme.title: Arlington Road [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Widowed when his FBI agent wife is killed by an extremist group, college professor Michael Faraday (Jeff Bridges) becomes obsessed with the culture of these groups -- especially when his new all-American neighbors, Oliver (Tim Robbins) and Cheryl Lang (Joan Cusack), start acting suspiciously. With each twist, the mystery deepens and questions loom whether Faraday is consumed by fear and driven by paranoia, or whether a lethal conspiracy has been born on Arlington Road.

programme.title: Brotherhood Of The Wolf
programme.desc: In 18th-century France, the Chevalier de Fronsac and his Native American friend Mani are sent to the Gevaudan province.

programme.title: Before the Devil Knows You're Dead
programme.desc: When two brothers organize the robbery of their parents' jewelry store the job goes horribly wrong, triggering a series of events that sends them, their father and one brother's wife barreling towards a shattering climax.

programme.title: 99 Homes
programme.desc: A recently unemployed single father struggles to get back his foreclosed home by working for the real estate broker who is the source of his frustration.

programme.title: CA$H
programme.desc: In this crime thriller starring Sean Bean and Chris Hemsworth, a down-and-out couple finds a briefcase of money that solves all their problems — until a menacing stranger forces them to commit armed robberies to pay it all back.

programme.title: Bad Country
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story, Bad Country concerns a veteran Baton Rouge detective who infiltrates the most powerful criminal enterprise in the South and, after taking down its top lieutenant and contract killer, convinces him to turn informant to help bring down the entire organization including its amoral leader.

programme.title: No Small Affair
programme.desc: A teenager falls for an "older woman" and wages an all-out campaign to boost her career and win her heart. Edited for TV

programme.title: S.I.S.
programme.desc: A covert branch of the LAPD called the Special Investigative Squad tracks known offenders and attempts to catch them in the act of committing crimes.

programme.title: 7 Seconds
programme.desc: When an experienced thief accidentally makes off with a Van Gogh, his partner is kidnapped by gangsters in pursuit of the painting, forcing the criminal to hatch a rescue plan.

programme.title: Dirty
programme.desc: Hard-edged story of a gangbanger turned cop who is forced to choose between his conscience and his loyalty to the code of blue all in the course of one day.

programme.title: Salome
programme.desc: Princess Salome uses her powers of seduction in an effort to convince King Herod to spare the life of John the Baptist.

programme.title: Middle Of The Night
programme.desc: March played a 53-year old widowed clothing manufacturer who happens to fall in love with one of his employees, 30 years his junior. As the romance blossoms and March experiences happiness for the first time in years, his family resents the intrusion of the young newcomer and they do their best to end the romance.

programme.title: The Ambushers
programme.desc: Agent Matt Helm is sent to discover the whereabouts of an experimental flying saucer which was brought down somewhere in Mexico and has to keep the saucer from falling into enemy hands.

programme.title: The Fuller Brush Girl
programme.desc: A scatterbrained door-to-door cosmetics saleswoman and her bumbling file clerk fiancé become prime suspects in a murder.

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

programme.title: Quadrophenia
programme.desc: Fueled by amphetamines and teen angst, Jimmy speeds around London on his scooter with his Mod friends getting into trouble.

programme.title: Hearts Beat Loud
programme.desc: A father and daughter form an unlikely songwriting duo in the summer before she leaves for college.

programme.title: A Walk In The Woods
programme.desc: After spending two decades in England, Bill Bryson (Robert Redford) returns to the U.S., where he decides the best way to connect with his homeland is to hike the Appalachian Trail with one of his oldest friends, Stephen Katz (Nick Nolte).

programme.title: Undisputed 4: Boyka
programme.desc: In the fourth installment of the fighting franchise, Boyka is shooting for the big leagues when an accidental death in the ring makes him question everything he stands for.

programme.title: Drive Angry 3D
programme.desc: John's daughter was murdered, so he escapes hell to rescue his granddaughter, with an FBI agent on his heels.

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: As human blood becomes more scarce, vampires must search for new ways to satisfy their craving.

programme.title: Cell
programme.desc: When a cell phone signal causes apocalyptic chaos, an artist is determined to reunite with his young son.

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: After a plane crash, a toxic virus begins to spread. A couple is quarantined but must fight for survival.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Best Man Dead Man
programme.desc: A bachelor party in the middle of nowhere quickly turns into a night of murder and mystery when the best man ends up with a knife in his head. Everyone is a suspect; only an eccentric private eye in town can solve the mystery.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: Triple Threat
programme.desc: A crime syndicate places a hit on a billionaire's daughter, making her the target of an elite assassin squad. A band of down-and-out mercenaries protects her, fighting tooth and nail to stop the assassins from reaching their target.

programme.title: Raging Fire
programme.desc: Bong is a highly respected cop with a long history of success on dangerous cases. However, his past soon comes back to haunt him when his former protégé seeks revenge against all those who have wronged him.

programme.title: Hansan: Rising Dragon
programme.desc: In 1592, Korea faces the threat of the powerful Japanese navy. As defending Adm. Yi Sun-sin's forces fall into crisis, they resort to a secret weapon: the dragon-headed ships known as geobukseon. Using them, they hope to turn the tide of the war.

programme.title: The Mob
programme.desc: The clash between the rising Longde Chamber of Commerce and the entrenched Tongmingtang occurs as old and new orders collide. Fierce family feuds erupt, igniting intense battles on the Shanghai Bund.

programme.title: The Good Father: The Martin MacNeill Story
programme.desc: The story of Dr. MacNeill brings home a new live-in "nanny" who is his mistress.

programme.title: Devil On Campus: The Larry Ray Story
programme.desc: An ex-convict moves into his daughter's dorm, and enthralls her friends.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Watts Family Tragedy
programme.desc: Includes exclusive never-before-seen footage and new interviews with Tammy Lee.

programme.title: Surviving My Father: The Rachel Jeffs Story
programme.desc: Rachel's journey from victim to victor, showing the triumph of the human spirit.

programme.title: The Good Father: The Martin MacNeill Story
programme.desc: The story of Dr. MacNeill brings home a new live-in "nanny" who is his mistress.

programme.title: Devil On Campus: The Larry Ray Story
programme.desc: An ex-convict moves into his daughter's dorm, and enthralls her friends.

programme.title: Cradle of Lies
programme.desc: Marissa was in a coma while pregnant and wakes up five years later to find that the baby she delivered is gone

programme.title: Snowman's Pass
programme.desc: Impresario aids fiancée in search for her fallen climber, masking his true goal: finding a spy satellite.

programme.title: Love at First Like
programme.desc: A journalist covering the Don Juan of dating apps ends up finding there's more than meets the eye.

programme.title: Fatal Performance
programme.desc: A struggling actress is hired to impersonate a woman for a business meeting, but soon finds her life in danger.

programme.title: A Match in Manhattan
programme.desc: When Celeste loses her teaching job, she becomes an au-pair for infamous New York tycoon Richard Trapp.

programme.title: Moonlight
programme.desc: In three defining chapters, Chiron, a young Black man growing up in Miami, is guided to manhood by the kindness, support, and love of his community.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Former Marine John "Falcon" Chapman is a dark anti-hero driven by guilt and suffering from PTSD, who will destroy himself unless given something else to destroy - a useful weapon-of-last-resort for the U.S. State Department.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When an angel grants a struggling water girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) three wishes, even her mom (Robin Givens) or coach (Reginald VelJohnson) can't figure out how she became a soccer superstar.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Duke Diver is living the high life as the freewheeling manager of a luxurious resort in Palm Springs, Calif. He soon faces competition from Leo, a former military man who likes the same woman that Duke is interested in. When Diver's past suddenly catches up with him, he must put aside his differences and reluctantly team up with Leo to stop whoever is trying to kill him.

programme.title: The Foreign Exchange Student 2: The Hunt
programme.desc: Mr. & Mrs. Nelson are excited to be getting two new foreign exchange students to live with them. All of a sudden a chain of murders start to happen again in the city of Houston. Is it connected to Sinclair's death? Who's bringing terror back?

programme.title: The Housekeeper
programme.desc: After the death of her son, Sharease Smalls loses everything, and is forced to move back in with her sister Elise. Struggling to find steady work, Sharease agrees to become a live-in housekeeper for a local crime boss, Zues. The pairs professional relationship soon turns intimate, but it’s only a veil of secrets and lies. Will Sharease survive the truth?

programme.title: Too Little Too Late
programme.desc: James “Honcho” Young II is a well-respected boss but his position is threatened by his ex-love, turned partner, Ryan “Rain” Mills who desperately wants to be next in line. Driven by jealousy, love and money, Rain sets her sights on taking what’s hers, causing Honcho to lose more than just his position. Can she afford the cost to be boss?

programme.title: The Special Affect
programme.desc: Expecting mother & artist, Destiny, spirals after a tragic loss. Her loving husband helps her cope, but a bad trip and missed meds spark disturbing memories. With the help of her best friend, Destiny uncovers a horrifying truth about her past.

programme.title: Through Sickness and Hell
programme.desc: When a police officer is trapped in a toxic marriage, he must find the strength to break free from his abusive wife, risking his career, reputation, but also his life as he battles the damaging stigma surrounding domestic violence against men.

programme.title: Top Gunner
programme.desc: Recent graduates at a secluded Air Force base must protect a bioweapon from the Russian military.

programme.title: Monster Island
programme.desc: Gigantic monsters threaten to destroy everything in their path as mankind remains defenseless.

programme.title: Shark Waters
programme.desc: Sharks attack a fishing charter. Shoreline miles away, those aboard are forced to fight for their lives.

programme.title: Oceans Rising
programme.desc: A scientist builds a massive ark after his warnings of an Earth destroying flood are ignored.

programme.title: Asteroid Vs Earth
programme.desc: When meteors threaten Earth's extinction, its greatest minds devise a plan to tilt the planet off its axis.

programme.title: Basket Case 2
programme.desc: Duane and his basket-bound mutant brother are taken in by a secret home for wayward freaks with journalists hot on their tail.

programme.title: Basket Case 3
programme.desc: Duane recovers from his delusional breakdown to find his freakish basket-bound brother Belial will soon become a father. But not everything is joyous as the once tight knit brothers no longer seem to trust each other.

programme.title: Grand Duel
programme.desc: After their powerful father is brutally murdered, the Saxon Brothers hire a group of bounty hunters to bring suspected killer Philipp Wermeer to justice. But when grizzled Sheriff Clayton saves the fugitive Philipp's life, the two set out to confront the Saxons and reveal the shocking truth about who really killed The Patriarch.

programme.title: Bird With the Crystal Plumage (Edited Version)
programme.desc: An American expatriate in Rome witnesses an attempted murder that is connected to an ongoing killing spree in the city, and despite himself and his girlfriend being targeted by the killer, he conducts his own investigation.

programme.title: Sequence Break
programme.desc: An reclusive video arcade technician's reality is fractured when a mysterious new game appears in his shopm causing strange metaphysical forces and bizarre biochemical mutations.

programme.title: Jakob's Wife
programme.desc: After an encounter with "The Master," Anne discovers bite marks on her neck, a new sense of power and an appetite to live bolder than ever. As the body count grows, Anne is increasingly torn between her enticing new existence and her life before.

programme.title: Habit
programme.desc: Sam is an alcoholic grieving over his father's death. When he meets the seductive Anna at a party, he immediately falls under her spell but begins to suspect that she's an actual vampire.

programme.title: Quicksand
programme.desc: A married couple almost divorcing become trapped in quicksand while hiking through a rainforest in Colombia. They battle the elements of the jungle and must work together to survive.

programme.title: What Josiah Saw
programme.desc: A family with buried secrets reunite at a farmhouse after two decades to pay for their past sins.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After a young stablehand kills a notorious gunslinger, he is baffled by the hostility of the townspeople about giving him the reward.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to steal it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An elderly couple moves to town under an assumed name to hide the fact that they are the parents of a killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After foiling a girl's attempt to rob a store, Lucas finds that she is planning to kill her stepfather.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves held at gunpoint by a prisoner being transported on a train, which becomes stranded from a plague of grasshoppers.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly replaces cooking with a March Madness-style bracket tournament for boxed brownie mixes, staging eight brands in head-to-head blind taste tests to crown an ultimate winner. After an epic series of eliminations, Duncan Hines Double Fudge emerges victorious at just $4.29 a box.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Jackie Bakula, beloved as Sparkles to Chewed Up fans, returns to the kitchen as a guest host while Carla Hall is away filming the Today Show, bringing her warm, professional energy and joining Michael Symon and Clinton Kelly for a celebratory cooking episode full of affection for the show.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Korean-American chef Esther Choi joins for Meat Optional Week, making Kimchi Fried Rice that converts even committed carnivores, while Clinton Kelly prepares his beloved home-alone tofu dish and the hosts celebrate the surprising depth and satisfaction of meatless cooking.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall closes out Meat Optional Week with a bold Butternut Squash Chili served over golden rounds of pre-made polenta, proving that a vegetarian chili can be just as hearty and craveable as any meat-based version. The hosts discuss the magic of pot liquor, winter herb gardening, and the underappreciated power of cooking tomatoes long enough to balance their acidity.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon opens Home Alone Week by making his ideal personal omelet ó the dish he truly loves cooking just for himself ó as the hosts celebrate an entire week of cooking without compromise, audience, or spousal interference. The conversation digs into the authentic food preferences everyone quietly keeps to themselves.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall stuns Michael and Clinton by revealing that her perfect home-alone meal is chili dogs ó a dish the Michelin-adjacent chef makes entirely for herself when no one is watching. The hosts celebrate the week's theme that authentic food preferences are often the most surprising and humanizing.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly wraps up Home Alone Week with the dish his husband Damon absolutely refuses to eat: a comforting Indian-inspired Tofu Sag Paneer riff that Clinton makes happily for himself when he has the kitchen to himself. The hosts celebrate the week's revelation that the most personal food choices are often the ones that define us most.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: A special compilation episode looking back at the best Chew It or Screw It moments from the past six months, featuring some of the show's most memorable guests playing along as the hosts ask them to weigh in on food, lifestyle, and totally random preferences. Segments include: Danielle Sepsy (the Scone Queen) forced to choose between scones and muffins—predictably choosing scones—plus her takes on stuffing vs. mashed potatoes and canned vs. homemade cranberry sauce; Liz Symon (Michael's wife) on orange wine, foofy cocktails, lazy sundaes, the New York Times Spelling Bee app (Queen Bee 99% of the time), stinky cheese, and the truth about cuddling with Michael; Marysol Castro on Citi Field hot dogs, pineapple on pizza (a hard Bronx no), and celebrity cameos at sporting events (the exception being Bad Bunny); Amanda Freitag and the crew on going out to eat on Valentine's Day (screw it—you get the worst service and cooks who rarely go out); Devyn Simone on cooking for someone on a first date (surprisingly chew it, as long as boundaries are established) and not texting the next day after getting lucky; Esther Choi on breakfast for dinner, ketchup on eggs (a unanimous screw it from the entire panel); Scott Conant on sending food back at a restaurant (screw it—you're an adult, figure it out), family style with strangers (chew it), and splitting the check 12 ways; Damaris Phillips on cornbread with sugar, Miracle Whip with bologna, and the boat-ride romance that made her appreciate Miracle Whip on a sandwich; Maneet Chauhan on spicy desserts, taking the last bite when sharing a dish (chew it if you're single and looking for a partner), and eating off someone else's plate; Mika Leon on the five-second rule, helicopter parenting, staying up 24 hours to cook (chew it—she did 32-plus hours on a cooking competition), and going to the club (hard pass, she's tired); and Chef Jackie Bula on air fryers (screw it—just fry), and reality cooking competitions (screw it—it's less about the food than the show). Audience engagement prompts woven throughout invite viewers to comment on their own chew-it-or-screw-it takes.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Chewed Up Compilation #2: BLOOPERS showcases the funniest and most unexpected moments from season four. Clinton accidentally consumes a THC-infused beverage before reading fan mail, Michael passionately debates whether air fryers are just convection ovens and defends wood cutting boards, and Carla reveals her unconventional Christmas card habits. The episode features heated discussions about bagel varieties, seed oils, Instagram fitness culture, and holiday movie preferences. The climax occurs during a butter cookie demonstration when a frozen egg yolk refuses to incorporate and a pastry bag catastrophically fails on camera, turning an otherwise polished cooking segment into comedic chaos.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The Chewed Up crew sets up poolside at the W Hotel South Beach for a breezy St. Patrick's Day episode that swaps corned beef for Cuban grilled shrimp. Michael Symon, whose Cleveland neighborhood is deeply Irish, admits he's been celebrating St. Patrick's Day with his best friend Jimmy for decades, and this year Jimmy joins them in Miami. Michael's Grilled Shrimp Mojo is a tribute to the Cuban flavors of Miami: shrimp marinated in lime zest, lime juice, chili flakes, and olive oil, then grilled and finished with a vibrant mojo sauce blended from sour orange, onion, a whole head of garlic, cilantro, parsley, and oregano. The key tip: cook shrimp until they look like commas, not O'sóthe moment they curl completely is the moment they're overdone. Clinton reflects on his seven years living in Miami and the city's culinary depth, from Cuban staples to modern restaurants like Yardbird. Carla raises her fear of sharks; Clinton counters with his inexplicable terror of birds getting caught in his hair. Michael confesses he bought a bathing suit specifically to go to the beach, put it on, saw himself in the mirror, and decided to spend the afternoon in bed instead.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Just in time for National Ravioli Day, acclaimed chef and Chopped judge Scott Conant joins the trio at the W South Beach to make his delicate ricotta gnocchiótechnically gnudióalongside his signature Martone Street jarred tomato sauce. Michael has been close friends with Scott for 15 years, and Clinton admits he was genuinely nervous before meeting the notoriously stern Chopped judge, quickly discovering he's warm and funny in person. Scott explains that Martone Street is named for his grandparents' home in Waterbury, Connecticut, where Sunday dinners taught him that conversation over food is one of life's greatest gifts. The gnocchi dough combines fresh ricotta, basil, breadcrumbs, flour, egg, and Parmesan, shaped into small dumplings and cooked until they float. Scott builds a stabilized butter sauce using pasta water and cornstarch as an emulsifieróa trick that keeps it smooth for hours. Finished with Martone Street sauce and broccoli rabe, the result is stunning in its simplicity. His philosophy runs throughout: spaghetti aglio e olio, done correctly, is one of the most complex and satisfying dishes imaginable. Scott becomes emotional talking about watching his 16-year-old daughter drive for the first time and the joy of steak cook-offs with his girls at home.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Food Network Star winner and Southern food authority Damaris Phillips brings a taste of Louisville poolside at the W South Beach, demonstrating three Southern tea sandwich classics that are anything but fussy. Carla Hall has been singing Damaris's praises for yearsómutual friend Jackie Guido insisted they were destined to be peas and carrotsóand the episode proves her right, the two radiating warmth and joy throughout. Damaris makes Pimento Cheese; Benedictine, a Louisville specialty of grated cucumber with dill and cream cheese (the key being squeezing out all the cucumber water first); and Ham Salad, essentially chicken salad's porky cousin, versatile as either sweet or savory. Everything is layered on Japanese milk bread or thin white bread, crusts removed, and assembled into dainty finger sandwiches and triple-decker stacks. Michael immediately tries to build an enormous open-face sandwich rather than the delicate bites Damaris intended, sparking a lively debate about proportion and restraint. Carla shares that she recently spent a cozy Super Sunday with Damaris in Louisvilleóa beloved tradition of soups, board games, and community. The episode also features a spirited group effort to talk Damaris out of her plan to get a leopard-print face tattoo, with limited success. The episode ends with genuine laughter, warm hugs, and unanimous agreement: the sandwiches are delicious.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Today's show is a special celebration of Julie's favorite season, Spring! This refreshing time of year puts a smile on Julie's face focusing her cooking on springtime offerings. What better way for Julie to cook, create and celebrate this sensational season than with her crown roasted leg of lamb infused with a bouquet of fresh herbs, slowly roasted, makes the centerpiece on the springtime table!

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Julie makes her Mezze magical in a stunning and scrumptious presentation of her Lebanese cultures most famous small plates perfectly plated for her loving Lebanese family to savor! Mezze, internationally known all over the world as one of the most distinctive and delicious display of dishes to discover originating from Lebanon and Middle East. Julie Taboulie's Mezze makes entertaining enchanting.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Julie serves up her street food star supreme sandwich, Shawarma. Succulent, spicy, saucy, shaved off a rotisserie spit, Shawarm is one of Lebanon's most famous street-food stars! Julie shares her special tips, tricks and techniques on how-to make her signature street food star, Shawarma, right at home so you can simply re-create her recipes in your very own kitchen and NO rotisserie spit needed.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: An extraordinary eggplant extravaganza Lebanese-style! Julie shares some of her favorite most famous Lebanese eggplant recipes freshly sourced straight from Mama's Glorious Garden. From simple and sophisticated to earthy and exotic, eggplants are excellent selections for sauces, spreads, soups, stews, stuffed and even pickled eggplant too.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: On today's show, a fresh farmer's market is inspiring Julie to make her marvelous Makbouseh, a Lebanese-style summertime squash stew. Julie's Makbouseh, a magnificent medley of fresh vegetables and array of amazing aromatics slowly simmer into a scrumptious squash stew, sure to be a staple at your table. Fresh from the farmer's market to a mouthwatering Lebanese masterpiece you won't want to miss.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Join the "Queen of Lebanese Cuisine", Julie Taboulie, as she pays a special tribute to her namesake dish and her culinary traditions. Throughout this visually vibrant show, Julie takes viewers back to memory lane of her Lebanese heritage and authentic dishes she grew up eating ever since she was a young girl at her family's Lebanese table. It's tart, it's tangy, it's tasty. It's Julie's Taboulie!

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino
programme.desc: Chef Stellino shares his sauce making secrets, to inspire the viewers with this elegant and sophisticated Mango and Ginger sauce that is easy to make and tastes delicious! He also shares some important fact about the uniqueness of the Black cod and his step by step secrets on how to plate this dish with the refined elegance of a professional chef.

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino
programme.desc: Meatloaf when done right can be a work of art, something worthy of the finest restaurant. It is all about technique and it is never hard to do right. Chef Stellino re-interprets for his viewers a fabulous Sicilian recipe from his youth and in the process he shares with them a series of foolproof techniques for getting done right every time.

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino
programme.desc: Cooking the perfect pork chop and preparing the ultimate sauce with port and Gorgonzola is a easy as 1-2-3! Making the perfect ricotta cheesecake is even easier. Chef Stellino loves to share his tips and techniques with a passionate delivery and easy to follow instructions.

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino

Plus he shows the viewers a series of simple techniques to create elegant topping to dress it all up. Simple clear instructions with step by step demonstrations on how to get it done in one try!

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: A family with a tiny patio and a huge back yard gets some help from Danny and the crew to make use of their space. Adding a second patio of large format pavers starts the process, while some modifications to family’s storage shed and the addition of a fire pit wrap it up.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: If your friends and family always enter your house through the laundry room, it better be a great one. Danny, Chelsea, and the crew rally to give this house a clean entrance complete with a cool new butcher block counter-top and an overflow pantry for the nearby kitchen.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This week we're helping a couple update a family room that looks smaller than it actually is. We’re removing part of a built-in cabinet system that overwhelms the room and adding some character to a fireplace wall to move it from “forgettable” to “focal.”

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Danny, Chelsea and the Today’s Homeowner team help a couple extend their living space to the outside with a patio transformation. After some clean-up and repair to an existing brick patio, they add a pergola and shade sail to enhance the space.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Danny and Chelsea help a couple, who both work from home, create better separation between work and home life. Building a wall and adding a door to separate the home office area from the Master Bedroom is just the beginning of this project to make both work and rest more productive.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Danny and Chelsea help a homeowner make improvements to her house to make it more insurable and attractive. A new metal roof and new front porch rail make the house more attractive to both the neighbors and the insurance company.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Danny and Chelsea help a family make some simple changes to expand their patio and make it more useable. Combining seating and storage for potted plants makes better use of the space and the addition of a retractable screen helps bring the outside inside.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This week we're tackling a challenge lots of homeowners face... making the most of the space in the garage. The addition of some unique shelving between the garage doors maximizes the available space while a fresh coat of paint and some window film improve the natural light.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Danny, Chelsea and the team help the single mother of three boys turn her family room into a cozy retreat for the four of them. A custom, convertible coffee table and an update to the fireplace and mantel are just a few of the projects that make it possible.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Danny and Chelsea help a homeowner convert her unused formal dining room into the perfect spot for relaxation complete with a daybed, a unique ceiling treatment fit for a queen and a custom bar made from a re-purposed piece of furniture.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Chelsea's primary bath needs an upgrade so we’re transforming it into a spa-like escape for a busy mom. We’re making the most of what’s here by adding luxurious wallpaper to both walls and ceilings, adding a bidet toilet seat and updating the mirrors.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Danny, Chelsea & the crew help a South Louisiana family put things back together after a hurricane and prepare them for the next one. They’re updating doors, creating convenient hurricane shutters and adding a new metal roof to protect this home on the bayou.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This week we’re converting a "plain Jane" patio into a backyard resort for a North Carolina couple. Their new two-part patio will be ready for warm weather with the addition of a shade sail and an outdoor fireplace will keep them comfortable when the air turns cold.

programme.desc: Meet the creatures seeking water and dodging predators in this land of extremes.

programme.title: Eurasian Lynx: The Queen in the North
programme.desc: Track this resilient wild cat, which thrives in extreme, icy northern climates.

programme.title: Africa's Wild Horizons
programme.desc: See how an imploded, but isolated, volcano is a home to many key species.

programme.title: Hotspots
programme.desc: Weigh the precarious balance between habitat preservation and human activity.

programme.title: Hot life in Africa
programme.desc: Get to know the savannah’s master of camouflage and a shade-making squirrel.

programme.title: Hotspots
programme.desc: Visit 4 threatened biodiversity hotspots that are crucial to Earth’s survival.

programme.title: Wild Hunters
programme.desc: See how wildcats’ strength and agility make them deadly killing machines.

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: Study strange-but-rewarding partnerships between some truly odd ocean dwellers.

programme.title: The Wonders of Bali
programme.desc: Bring the exotic sights and sounds of Bali's island paradise into your home with the sounds of nature and beautiful Balinese Music.

programme.title: The World's Most Beautiful Sunrises and Sunsets
programme.desc: Beautiful sunrises and sunsets from around the globe. Locations include: Thailand, the Seychelles, Canyonlands National Park, Bali, the Pacific Coast and migratory birds in the National Wildlife Refuges.

programme.title: Over the California Coast
programme.desc: Explore and enjoy the northern California coast as never before. NatureVision TV brings you a birds eye view as you travel from Big Sur to Salt Point.

programme.title: A Tranquil Stream
programme.desc: Take in the peaceful, natural beauty of a Pennsylvania stream. Relax as the melodic water flows downstream cradled in the vibrant tree-covered canopy.

programme.title: Beautiful Costa Rica
programme.desc: Experience the magic of the Costa Rican Cloud Forest. Visit the Osa Peninsula, one of the most bio-diverse locations on Earth. Descend into the Monte Verde Cloud Forest and its life-giving mist.

programme.title: The World's Most Beautiful Places
programme.desc: With extraordinary cinematography filmed in Hawaii, Costa Rica, New England, the California Redwoods, the Rocky Mountains, the Olympic Rain Forest, the Pacific Coast, Bali and the Sacred Canyons of the Southwest you'll have a glimpse of some of the most unique, beautiful places in the world.

programme.title: Put On Your Shoes - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a Super Simple Song all about getting dressed! Sing along as we put on our shoes, jacket, hat, and scarf and then head out for a walk with the family.

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: Let's Count To 100 - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: We are learning to count to 100 with Finny the Shark! This is a perfect numbers song for young kids and preschoolers! Let’s count to 100. Counting’s so much fun. Let’s count to 100. We’ll start from number 1.

programme.title: Seven Steps - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Counting to seven has never been more memorable and fun! Learn numbers with this simple counting song.

programme.title: Goodbye A, Goodbye Z - Super Simple ABCs and more
programme.desc: We're saying, "Goodbye" to all of our friends in Alphabet Village. As the school day ends, take a walk through town, and bid farewell to all of the letters.

programme.title: The Bumble Nums - Super Simple Collection 1
programme.desc: Once Humble, Grumble, and Stumble make it to their kitchen with ingredient intact, it's time to make the dish.

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Animals
programme.desc: This is all about Animals! Includes children's favorites “Alice the Camel”, “Let’s Go To Zoo” and More!

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Space & Planets
programme.desc: This compilation is about Space & Planets! Includes children's songs "Mr. Golden Sun", “Skidamarink” & "More!

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Underwater
programme.desc: This compilation is about Underwater! Includes children's songs "Baby Shark", "Sailor Went To Sea" and More!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Counting and Numbers
programme.desc: The Super Simple show is a compilation of Super Simple’s most popular songs and series that our fans love! This compilation is all about Numbers and Counting! Includes children's song favorites "10 Little Buses", “10 In the Bed” & "10 Little Dinosaurs" and featuring Carl's Car Wash, The Bumble Nums, Sing Along With Tobee, and More!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Your little one will want to keep a beat, snap his fingers and march his feet! Join new characters Pillie, the musical woodpecker, and Coco, the dancing cockatoo, and share the excitement of rhythm with your baby. World of Rhythm explores rhythm in music, rhythm in nature and rhythm as a form of expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Sing along to your favorite classical melodies and enjoy engaging imagery in this space and sky themed episode. Young viewers can learn words like star and moon through repetition and narration, explore with the Baby Einstein characters, or simply dance along.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies continue to explore the world around them, they soon encounter many creatures, both large and small, that are extremely intriguing. Whether furry or feathered, winged or wiggly, bumpy or smooth, each holds a special fascination. Neighborhood Animals exposes little ones to animals most likely to be found close to home or in easily recognized environments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Sharing the joys and traditions of the holiday season with your little one is truly one of the greatest gifts of parenthood, and Baby Santa's Music Box makes this magical time even more special! Celebrate by treating your baby and yourself to a captivating wonderland of bright lights, sparkling ornaments, sleigh bells, toys, winter scenes, jolly Santas and more -- all accompanied by beloved holiday melodies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Loco Nuts - Funny Cartoon Show for Kids

programme.title: Super Supremes Dinosaur Song & More Kids Songs

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik has his eyes set upon Queen Aleena's crown jewel, but Sonic, Manic and Sonia plan to retrieve the gem before Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic and Sonia find an abandoned baby in an alley and begin to look for the baby's parents. Manic becomes very fond of the child.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A captain of the Queen's guard is captured before he can reach the secret rendezvous where he was to meet Queen Aleena.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia discovers that the watch she received from her friend is actually a monitoring device for the Robotnik Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sleet and Dingo plan to collect the taxes owed to Robotnik from the Duke of Velcronia but keep it for themselves.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: A fast talking, travelling salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik various hedgehog-catching gadgets, including the Darkenator, the Super-duper Gravity Stopper, and the De-Atomizer.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic rescues Lucas, a rival of Robotnik's, from Robotnik's dungeons. But Robotnik will do anything to keep Lucas from finding his lost love, Lucinda, including proposing to her himself.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Big Griz, leader of a group of biker-bear rebels, mistakes Scratch and Grounder for Sonic and Tails, and teams up with S and G to attack the real Sonic and Tails.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails gets a megadose of Robotniks growth gas and grows quickly to monstrous proportions, eating everything in sight and accidentally terrorizing the countryside.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Sonic decides to find Tails a suitable foster home, Robotnik finds out, and creates a robot fox family which poses as Tails' long lost parents. Sonic leaves Tails with the fox family, but finally realizes they're robots and rescues Tails.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: An elderly, out of shape, overweight superhero keeps trying to help Sonic battle Dr. Robotnik, and keeps getting him in more jepordy. Sonic helps the old hero regain his self respect and they team up to battle Robotnik's latest scheme.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: After an accident, Scratch thinks he's an eagle and on the side of Sonic. In order to impress his his new lady love, Scratch assists Sonic in an excursion into Robotnik's Fortress to turn off a dangerous force field.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic turns detective to solve the mystery of his missing Red Sneakers--and just in time to get them back and stop Dr. Robotnik's latest attack on a peaceful Mobius village.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Uncle Chuck's "bug" reveals Robotnik's search for the legendary Deep Power Stones, he informs Sally, who tries to retrieve data regarding the Royal Family Secret. But she's denied access via a time-encoded lock-out.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While enjoying lunch in the café, the girls are interrupted by some music coming from the gazebo. They head outside and find Sadiebug and Kadiebug wearing badges and standing by a banner and podium. A group of chairs are set up in front of them. The twins begin to announce, and then argue, that they are starting a club - a good citizens club. The girls are shocked as the twins argue with each other all the time.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With all the Baby Berrykins running around Berry Bitty City, Princess Berrykin decides to build a Day Care Center and playground. But she's worried because it's dull-looking - all grey metal and brown wood. She asks Strawberry whom might be good to help her out. And two names immediately come to her mind - Lemon and Raspberry! The Princess confesses she's always admired their sense of design and style.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: After returning to the café after a walk with her pets, Strawberry is met by Mr. Longface. He's been waiting for her so that they can get started making treats and decorating for Sadiebug's and Kadiebug's party that afternoon. But Custard and Pupcake have enjoyed their time outside so much that they want to continue playing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest; she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Earthrise: The First Lunar Voyage
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve 1968, one of the largest audiences in television history tuned in to an extraordinary sight: a live telecast of the moon's surface as seen from Apollo 8, the first manned space flight to leave Earth's gravitational pull and orbit the moon. The historic journey captivated people around the world.As this documentary reveals, however, the mission's success was far from assured. The Apollo 8 astronauts had just four months to prepare for the risky lunar orbit, and catastrophic failure would have brought a halt to America's goal of putting a man on the moon before the end of the decade.This film recounts the flight many consider to be NASA's most daring and important. Interviews with Apollo 8 astronauts, their wives, mission control staff, and journalists take viewers inside the high-stakes space race of the late 1960s to reveal how a bold decision by NASA administrators put a struggling Apollo program back on track and allowed America to reach the moon before the Soviets.

programme.title: Visioneer: The Peter Diamandis Story
programme.desc: Visioneer tells the story of Peter Diamandis' vision to create the X Prize, a $10 million contest meant to encourage the creation of new space vehicles and a whole new space industry. Peter dreamed of outer space his whole life. But since the days of his childhood, when NASA’s Apollo program was at its height, the public’s excitement for space exploration has waned, even if Peter's obsession never did. He set out to find a way to kick-start the next evolution of spaceflight, inspiring people all over the world to look to the stars again. Through hard work, passion, and a never-say-die attitude, Peter and his colleagues managed to overcome hurdle after hurdle to create the Ansari X Prize and help usher in a new era of private space flight. The film features interviews and commentary from Sir Richard Branson, President Bill Clinton, will.i.am, Anthony Robbins, Ray Kurzweil, Ross Perot Jr., Dean Kamen, and many other visionaries.Dr. Peter H. Diamandis is an international pioneer in the fields of innovation, incentive competitions and commercial space. In 2014 he was named one of The World’s 50 Greatest Leaders by Fortune magazine. He is Chairman and CEO of the X PRIZE Foundation; Co-Founder and Vice-Chairman of Human Longevity Inc. (HLI), Co-Founder and Executive Chairman of Singularity University; Co-Founder/Co-Chairman of Planetary Resources; and Co-Founder of Space Adventures and Zero-Gravity Corporation.

programme.title: Eagles of Mercy
programme.desc: EAGLES OF MERCY recounts a seldom-told chapter in the World War II narrative, picking up in the opening moments of D-Day. In the early hours of June 6, 1944, two young American medics with the 101st Airborne Screaming Eagles parachuted into France, and soon found themselves trapped in a 12th-century Norman church in the small village of Angoville-au-Plain. Medics Robert Wright and Kenneth Moore provided first aid to the first casualties of D-Day while a savage battle raged outside between American and German forces. During the documentary, Wright and Moore recount the rigors of basic training, parachuting into Normandy ahead of the amphibious landing on Utah Beach, surviving German anti-aircraft artillery and carrying on their life-saving work even when their unit retreated. EAGLES OF MERCY supplements these compelling stories with newsreel footage, re-enactments and interviews with fellow medics and residents of Angoville.

programme.title: The Seabees on Iwo Jima
programme.desc: THE SEABEES ON IWO JIMA focuses on the United States Naval Construction Battalions in World War II, which built all the infrastructure for the Allies in Europe and the Pacific in WWII. The Seabees were construction workers by trade and signed up to become part of a special battalion in the war that built the airfields, runways, and bases needed in the war. The Seabees, some 60 years of age, were best known for their work on coral islands in the Pacific, where they helped build runways out of the jungle which helped the United States take the war right to Japan's doorstep in 1945.The Seabee's motto was We Build; We Fight. Not only did these men have to build bases, but many times they had to put down their shovels or get off their bulldozers and pick up a rifle or machine gun to fend off enemy attacks. The Seabee's most violent fight was on Iwo Jima, where they went ashore in the first wave with the Marines. It's on Iwo Jima where their motto We Build; We Fight was most famously put to the test in World War II.

programme.title: Rick Steves Art of Europe
programme.desc: In the 1800s, the Industrial Revolution spawned new artistic styles: idealized Romanticism, light-chasing Impressionism, sensuous Art Nouveau. Then Europes tumultuous 20th century inspired rule-breaking art as exciting as the times: from Expressionism and Cubism to Surrealism to Abstract. The genius of artists like Van Gogh, Picasso, and Dal express the complexity of our modern world.

programme.title: Rick Steves Art of Europe
programme.desc: As the Ice Age glaciers melted, European civilization was born and with it, so was art. From the Stone Age came prehistoric art: mysterious tombs, mighty megaliths, and vivid cave paintings. Then the Egyptians and the Greeks laid the foundations of Western art creating a world of magical gods, massive pyramids, sun-splashed temples, and ever-more-lifelike statues.

programme.title: Rick Steves Art of Europe
programme.desc: The Romans gave Europe its first taste of a common culture and awe-inspiring art. From its groundbreaking architecture to its statues, mosaics, and frescos, Rome engineered bigger and better than anyone before. At its peak, the Roman Empire was a society of unprecedented luxury, with colossal arenas for entertaining the masses and giant monuments to egotistical emperors. And then it fell.
